copy.tagline: Korean café. Bingsu, matcha, good vibes.
copy.body: Project Seoul brings the café culture of Seoul to Toronto — shaved milk ice piled with toppings, ceremonial matcha pulled properly, and a space that feels like somewhere you actually want to be.
copy.label: WHAT WE MAKE

sections.title: Bingsu
sections.body: Shaved milk ice, lighter than you expect and loaded with toppings. Mango, strawberry, matcha, red bean — rotated with the season. Made to order every time.

sections.title: Matcha & Drinks
sections.body: Ceremonial grade matcha as a latte or over ice. Dalgona whipped to order, yuzu lemonade house-made daily. Korean favourites alongside your usual espresso.

sections.title: Bites
sections.body: Croffles pressed golden on the iron, tteok soft and freshly made, sikhye chilled and sweet. Small things done well, the Seoul way.

menuItems.name: Tteok
menuItems.desc: soft rice cake, red bean or sesame

copy.tagline: Seoul's café culture, at home in Toronto.
copy.body: Project Seoul is a modern Korean café built around the things we love — bingsu piled high, matcha pulled from ceremonial grade, and a room worth sitting in. Every item is made with intention, nothing is an afterthought.
copy.label: WHAT WE DO

sections.title: Bingsu
sections.body: Shaved milk ice, lighter than you expect and loaded with toppings. Mango, strawberry, matcha, red bean — rotated with the season. Made to order every time.

sections.title: Matcha & Coffee
sections.body: Ceremonial grade matcha served as a latte or straight over ice. Dalgona whipped to order, iced americano done simply. We take the drinks as seriously as the food.

sections.title: Bites
sections.body: Croffles pressed golden on the iron, tteok soft and freshly made, sikhye chilled and sweet. Small things done well, the Seoul way.

menuItems.name: Tteok
menuItems.desc: soft rice cake, red bean or sesame

copy.tagline: Korean café. Bingsu, croffle, matcha, and more.
copy.body: Project Seoul is a modern Korean café bringing the flavours of Seoul's café culture to Toronto. From shaved ice bingsu to buttery croffles and ceremonial matcha, every item is made with care and a little bit of obsession.
copy.label: WHAT WE MAKE

menuItems.name: Matcha Latte
menuItems.desc: ceremonial grade, oat or whole milk

menuItems.name: Tteok
menuItems.desc: soft rice cake, red bean or sesame

copy.tagline: Seoul in a cup. Toronto at the table.
copy.body: Project Seoul is a Korean café rooted in the dessert culture of Seoul — bingsu piled high, croffles straight off the iron, and matcha pulled from ceremonial grade. We're a neighbourhood spot that takes what we serve seriously, without taking ourselves too seriously.
copy.label: WHAT WE MAKE

sections.title: Bingsu
sections.body: Shaved milk ice loaded with toppings. Mango, strawberry, matcha, red bean — rotated seasonally. Made to order, served fast.

sections.title: Croffle
sections.body: Croissant dough pressed in a waffle iron until golden and layered. Honey butter, cream cheese, or seasonal fruit. Straight off the iron.

sections.title: Coffee & Drinks
sections.body: Matcha from ceremonial grade, dalgona whipped to order, yuzu lemonade house-made daily. Korean favourites alongside your usual espresso.
